name: performance-vitals
description: Enforce Core Web Vitals optimization. Use when building user-facing features, reviewing performance, or when Lighthouse scores drop. Covers LCP, FID/INP, CLS, and optimization techniques.
capabilities: Provides target thresholds for LCP, INP, and CLS metrics
Offers code examples for image and font optimization
Explains techniques to fix long JavaScript tasks and improve interactivity
Shows how to prevent layout shifts with proper sizing and skeleton loaders
Includes Lighthouse CI configuration and performance budget setup
Delivers quick optimization checklists for each Core Web Vitals metric
author: Doyajin174
securitySummary: This is a pure documentation skill containing only markdown content with code examples. No executable code, no file system access, no network calls, no environment variable access. The skill provides text-based guidance for Core Web Vitals optimization.
valueStatement: Poor Core Web Vitals hurt user experience and SEO rankings. This skill provides clear guidelines, code examples, and checklists to achieve optimal LCP, INP, and CLS scores for better user engagement.
limitations: Does not measure or analyze actual website performance data
Cannot directly modify code or configuration files
Does not integrate with CI/CD pipelines or analytics services
Provides guidance only, not automated testing or deployment

useCases.title: Fix slow page loads
useCases.description: Identify and resolve LCP issues causing slow initial page rendering and improve time-to-interactive.

useCases.title: Set up performance budgets
useCases.description: Configure Lighthouse CI with performance budgets to prevent performance regressions in deployments.

useCases.title: Understand Web Vitals impact
useCases.description: Learn how Core Web Vitals affect SEO rankings and user experience metrics to prioritize improvements.

promptTemplates.title: Image LCP fix
promptTemplates.scenario: Improve slow LCP caused by hero images
promptTemplates.prompt: My hero image is causing poor LCP scores. Help me optimize it using Next.js Image component with priority loading and proper sizing.

promptTemplates.title: INP interactivity
promptTemplates.scenario: Improve poor INP from heavy JavaScript
promptTemplates.prompt: My application has high INP due to long JavaScript tasks. Show me how to split long tasks and use React useTransition to improve interactivity.

promptTemplates.title: CLS layout shifts
promptTemplates.scenario: Fix layout shifts from dynamic content
promptTemplates.prompt: Dynamic content is causing high CLS scores. Show me how to reserve space with skeleton loaders and proper image sizing to prevent layout shifts.

promptTemplates.title: Performance audit
promptTemplates.prompt: Set up Lighthouse CI with a performance budget that enforces LCP under 2.5s, INP under 200ms, and CLS under 0.1 for my production deployments.

bestPractices: Always add width, height, and priority props to LCP images to enable browser optimization and preload
Use skeleton loaders or min-height for dynamic content to prevent layout shifts before content loads
Break long JavaScript tasks into chunks under 50ms using async/await and setTimeout yield patterns
antiPatterns: Using unoptimized images without explicit dimensions or priority for above-the-fold content
Executing heavy computations synchronously on the main thread without yielding to event loop
Rendering dynamic content without reserving space, causing layout shifts and CLS penalties

faq.question: What tools measure Core Web Vitals accurately?
faq.answer: Use Google Lighthouse, Chrome DevTools Performance tab, web-vitals JavaScript library, or Google Search Console for real-user data.

faq.question: What are the good thresholds for each metric?
faq.answer: LCP under 2.5s, INP under 200ms, CLS under 0.1. Values above 4s, 500ms, or 0.25 are considered poor.

faq.question: How does this skill integrate with my codebase?
faq.answer: This skill provides guidance and code examples. You apply the recommendations manually to your code using Read, Edit, and Write tools.

faq.question: Does this skill send my data externally?
faq.answer: No. This is a pure documentation skill that only provides text guidance. No data leaves your environment.

faq.question: Why is my INP score worse than FID?
faq.answer: INP replaced FID in 2024 and measures all interactions, not just first input. INP captures the worst latency across all page interactions.

faq.question: How is this different from Lighthouse alone?
faq.answer: Lighthouse measures performance and shows problems. This skill explains why problems occur and provides specific code patterns to fix them.
